title: Funding carry instrument metadata blocker resolution plan
blocker_reason: instrument-snapshot collector can capture current exchange rules, but it cannot reconstruct historical exchangeInfo partitions for 2026-06-08.

accepted_resolution_paths.description: Use an official exchange, archive, or internally stored dated exchangeInfo snapshot for 2026-06-08.
accepted_resolution_paths.allowed_downstream_state: can satisfy instrument_metadata coverage after partition write

accepted_resolution_paths.description: For highly liquid Binance BTC/ETH/SOL spot and USD-M perp markets only, use a reviewer-approved current exchangeInfo snapshot as a static metadata assumption when the review date is close to the replay window.
required_evidence: reviewer confirmation that symbol status, base/quote assets, contract size, precision and expiry fields are consistent with the replay window
explicit note that this is an assumption, not an official historical snapshot
accepted_resolution_paths.allowed_downstream_state: can unlock fixture-like historical replay only after human review; cannot be described as official historical validation

reject_if: symbol was listed, delisted, renamed, migrated or suspended near the replay window
precision, contract size, quote asset or margin rule changed between replay date and snapshot date
the replay window is more than one day away from the observed snapshot
the strategy needs liquidation, margin mode, leverage bracket, borrow or account-level constraints that are not present in exchangeInfo

output_partition_contract.required_payload: Instrument payload with raw evidence hash and assumption notes when fallback path is used

next_actions: Prefer an official dated exchangeInfo archive for 2026-06-08.
If no dated archive exists, capture current Binance exchangeInfo and apply the manual_static_metadata_assumption path only after human review.
Use instrument-assumption only after evidence_hash, evidence_source, assumption_note and reviewer are recorded.
Write instrument partitions only after recording the chosen resolution path and evidence hash.
Rerun check_data_coverage for #1 after instrument partitions and the other 20 supported partitions are written.
safety_boundary: This plan resolves research metadata coverage only. It does not execute trades, approve live deployment, change production configuration or mark the strategy production-ready.
